message:
feat(connectors): add resource URI extraction for capability verification

Enhances the Anthropic, Discord, OpenAI, and Telegram connectors to
extract resource URIs from operation inputs and pass them to the
capability verifier, enabling fine-grained authorization checks.

Changes per connector:

Anthropic (connector.rs):
- Extracts model from input for message/chat operations
- Passes "anthropic:model:{model}" URI to verifier
- Defaults to claude-sonnet-4-20250514 if model not specified

Discord (connector.rs):
- Extracts channel_id and guild_id from input when present
- Passes "discord:channel:{id}" and "discord:guild:{id}" URIs
- Enables per-channel and per-guild authorization scoping

OpenAI (connector.rs):
- Extracts model for chat/simple_chat operations
- Passes "openai:model:{model}" URI to verifier
- Defaults to gpt-4o if model not specified

Telegram (connector.rs):
- Extracts chat_id (handles both string and integer formats)
- Extracts file_id for file operations
- Extracts callback_query_id for inline keyboard responses
- Passes appropriate "telegram:{resource}:{id}" URIs

This change enables hosts to issue capability tokens with resource
constraints (e.g., "only allow posting to channel X") that are
enforced at invoke time, completing the FCP capability-based
authorization model.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
